# newswatch

> News monitoring pipeline — collect, extract, search, and track changes across RSS feeds.

## Purpose

newswatch chains four QuartzUnit libraries (feedkit, markgrab, embgrep, diffgrab) into an end-to-end news monitoring pipeline. It subscribes to RSS/Atom feeds, extracts full article content as markdown, indexes articles for semantic search, and optionally tracks specific pages for content changes.

## Capabilities

- **Feed subscription**: Subscribe to feeds from a built-in catalog by category or by custom URL (via feedkit)
- **Article extraction**: Fetch and convert full article content to markdown (via markgrab)
- **Semantic indexing**: Index extracted articles for natural language search (via embgrep)
- **Change tracking**: Monitor specific URLs for content changes over time (via diffgrab)
- **Full pipeline**: Single command runs collect, extract, index, and track in sequence

## Installation

```
pip install newswatch
```

Dependencies: feedkit, markgrab, embgrep, diffgrab, click, rich

## Quick Use

### CLI

```bash
newswatch setup -c technology -c science         # subscribe to catalog feeds
newswatch run                                     # full pipeline: collect + extract + index
newswatch search "transformer architecture"       # semantic search across articles
```

### Python

```python
from newswatch.pipeline import NewsPipeline

pipeline = NewsPipeline()
await pipeline.setup(categories=["technology"])
result = await pipeline.run(extract_limit=50)     # PipelineResult
hits = pipeline.search("transformer architecture") # list[dict]
pipeline.close()
```

## Links

- Docs: https://github.com/QuartzUnit/newswatch
- PyPI: https://pypi.org/project/newswatch/
- Source: https://github.com/QuartzUnit/newswatch
